verdict_reason: The engineering layer follows Shankara's partlessness-and-all-pervasiveness reading without conflating it with Ramanuja's universal-scope-from-gods-to-immovables reading; both readings reach the same conclusion (do not grieve for any beings) but for different reasons, and the engineering layer adopts the structural 'inviolable in every implementation' move that both share. The bridge function (2.30 closes the imperishable section, 2.31 opens duty) is preserved with explicit foreshadowing — 'After this verse, the chapter pivots to duty' — which is exactly what the commentarial tradition emphasizes.
